name: Sonic Adventure 2 Battle
description: Sonic Adventure 2 Battle is an action platforming game.

options.label: Progression Balancing
options.description: A system that can move progression earlier, to try and prevent the player from getting stuck and bored early.

options.label: Accessibility
options.description: Set rules for reachability of your items/locations.

options.label: Goal
options.description: Determines the goal of the seed Biolizard: Finish Cannon's Core and defeat the Biolizard and Finalhazard Chaos Emerald Hunt: Find the Seven Chaos Emeralds and reach Green Hill Zone Finalhazard Chaos Emerald Hunt: Find the Seven Chaos Emeralds and reach Green Hill Zone, then defeat Finalhazard Grand Prix: Win every race in Kart Race Mode (all standard levels are disabled) Boss Rush: Beat all of the bosses in the Boss Rush, ending with Finalhazard Cannon's Core Boss Rush: Beat Cannon's Core, then beat all of the bosses in the Boss Rush, ending with Finalhazard Boss Rush Chaos Emerald Hunt: Find the Seven Chaos Emeralds, then beat all of the bosses in the Boss Rush, ending with Finalhazard Chaos Chao: Raise a Chaos Chao to win Minigame Madness: Win a certain amount of each Minigame Trap, then defeat Finalhazard

options.label: Boss Rush Shuffle
options.description: Determines how bosses in Boss Rush Mode are shuffled Vanilla: Bosses appear in the Vanilla ordering Shuffled: The same bosses appear, but in a random order Chaos: Each boss is randomly chosen separately (one will always be King Boom Boo) Singularity: One boss is chosen and placed in every slot (one will always be replaced with King Boom Boo)

options.label: Minigame Madness Requirement
options.description: Determines how many of each Minigame Trap must be won (for Minigame Madness goal) Receiving this many of a Minigame Trap will allow you to replay that minigame at-will in the Chao World lobby

options.label: Minigame Madness Minimum
options.description: Determines the minimum number of each Minigame Trap that are created (for Minigame Madness goal) At least this many of each trap will be created as "Progression Traps", regardless of other trap option selections

options.label: Gate Boss Plando
options.description: Possible Locations: "Gate 1 Boss" "Gate 2 Boss" "Gate 3 Boss" "Gate 4 Boss" "Gate 5 Boss" Possible Bosses: "Sonic vs Shadow 1" "Sonic vs Shadow 2" "Tails vs Eggman 1" "Tails vs Eggman 2" "Knuckles vs Rouge 1" "BIG FOOT" "HOT SHOT" "FLYING DOG" "Egg Golem (Sonic)" "Egg Golem (Eggman)" "King Boom Boo"

options.label: Logic Difficulty
options.description: What set of Upgrade Requirement logic to use Standard: The logic assumes the "intended" usage of Upgrades to progress through levels Hard: Some simple skips or sequence breaks may be required, but no out-of-bounds Expert: If it is humanly possible, it may be required

options.label: Required Rank
options.description: Determines what minimum Rank is required to send a check for a mission

options.label: Max Emblem Cap
options.description: Determines the maximum number of emblems that can be in the item pool.

options.label: Ring Loss
options.description: How taking damage is handled Classic: You lose all of your rings when hit Modern: You lose 20 rings when hit OHKO: You die immediately when hit (NOTE: Some Hard or Expert Logic tricks may require damage boosts!)

options.label: Mission Shuffle
options.description: Determines whether missions order will be shuffled per level

options.label: Required Cannons Core Missions
options.description: Determines how many Cannon's Core missions must be completed (for Biolizard or Cannon's Core goals) First: Only the first mission must be completed All Active: All active Cannon's Core missions must be completed

options.label: Emblem Percentage For Cannons Core
options.description: Allows logic to gate the final mission behind a number of Emblems

options.label: Number Of Level Gates
options.description: The number emblem-locked gates which lock sets of levels

options.label: Level Gate Distribution
options.description: Determines how levels are distributed between level gate regions Early: Earlier regions will have more levels than later regions Even: Levels will be evenly distributed between all regions Late: Later regions will have more levels than earlier regions

options.label: Level Gate Costs
options.description: Determines how many emblems are required to unlock level gates

options.label: Keysanity
options.description: Determines whether picking up Chao Keys grants checks (86 Locations)

options.label: Whistlesanity
options.description: Determines whether whistling at various spots grants checks None: No Whistle Spots grant checks Pipes: Whistling at Pipes grants checks (97 Locations) Hidden: Whistling at Hidden Whistle Spots grants checks (32 Locations) Both: Whistling at both Pipes and Hidden Whistle Spots grants checks (129 Locations)

options.label: Beetlesanity
options.description: Determines whether destroying Gold Beetles grants checks (27 Locations)

options.label: Omosanity
options.description: Determines whether activating Omochao grants checks (192 Locations)

options.label: Animalsanity
options.description: Determines whether unique counts of animals grant checks.

options.label: Itemboxsanity
options.description: Determines whether collecting Item Boxes grants checks None: No Item Boxes grant checks Extra Lives: Extra Life Boxes grant checks (94 Locations) All: All Item Boxes grant checks (502 Locations Total)

options.label: Bigsanity
options.description: Determines whether helping Big fish grants checks.

options.label: Kart Race Checks
options.description: Determines whether Kart Race Mode grants checks None: No Kart Races grant checks Mini: Each Kart Race difficulty must be beaten only once Full: Every Character must separately beat each Kart Race difficulty

options.label: Black Market Slots
options.description: Determines how many multiworld items are available to purchase from the Black Market

options.label: Black Market Unlock Costs
options.description: Determines how many Chao Coins are required to unlock sets of Black Market items

options.label: Black Market Price Multiplier
options.description: Determines how many rings the Black Market items cost The base ring costs of items in the Black Market range from 50-100, and are then multiplied by this value

options.label: Chao Race Difficulty
options.description: Determines the number of Chao Race difficulty levels included.

options.label: Chao Karate Difficulty
options.description: Determines the number of Chao Karate difficulty levels included.

options.label: Chao Stadium Checks
options.description: Determines which Chao Stadium activities grant checks All: Each individual race and karate fight grants a check Prize: Only the races which grant Chao Toys grant checks (final race of each Beginner and Jewel cup, 4th, 8th, and 12th Challenge Races, 2nd and 4th Hero and Dark Races, final fight of each Karate difficulty)

options.label: Chao Animal Parts
options.description: Determines whether giving Chao various animal parts grants checks (73 Locations)

options.label: Chao Stats
options.description: Determines the highest level in each Chao Stat that grants checks (Swim, Fly, Run, Power)

options.label: Chao Stats Frequency
options.description: Determines how many levels in each Chao Stat grant checks (up to the maximum set in the `chao_stats` option) `1` means every level is included, `2` means every other level is included, `3` means every third, and so on

options.label: Chao Stats Stamina
options.description: Determines whether Stamina is included in the `chao_stats` option

options.label: Chao Stats Hidden
options.description: Determines whether the hidden stats (Luck and Intelligence) are included in the `chao_stats` option

options.label: Chao Kindergarten
options.description: Determines whether learning the lessons from the Kindergarten Classroom grants checks (WARNING: VERY SLOW) None: No Kindergarten classes have checks Basics: One class from each category (Drawing, Dance, Song, and Instrument) is a check (4 Locations) Full: Every class is a check (23 Locations)

options.label: Shuffle Starting Chao Eggs
options.description: Determines whether the starting Chao eggs in the gardens are random

options.label: Chao Entrance Randomization
options.description: Determines whether entrances in Chao World are randomized

options.label: Junk Fill Percentage
options.description: Replace a percentage of non-required emblems in the item pool with random junk items

options.label: Trap Fill Percentage
options.description: Replace a percentage of junk items in the item pool with random traps

options.label: Omochao Trap Weight
options.description: Likelihood of receiving a trap which spawns several Omochao around the player

options.label: Timestop Trap Weight
options.description: Likelihood of receiving a trap which briefly stops time

options.label: Confusion Trap Weight
options.description: Likelihood of receiving a trap which causes the controls to be skewed for a period of time

options.label: Tiny Trap Weight
options.description: Likelihood of receiving a trap which causes the player to become tiny

options.label: Gravity Trap Weight
options.description: Likelihood of receiving a trap which increases gravity

options.label: Exposition Trap Weight
options.description: Likelihood of receiving a trap which tells you the story

options.label: Ice Trap Weight
options.description: Likelihood of receiving a trap which makes the world slippery

options.label: Slow Trap Weight
options.description: Likelihood of receiving a trap which makes you gotta go slow

options.label: Cutscene Trap Weight
options.description: Likelihood of receiving a trap which makes you watch an unskippable cutscene

options.label: Reverse Trap Weight
options.description: Likelihood of receiving a trap which reverses your controls

options.label: Literature Trap Weight
options.description: Likelihood of receiving a trap which forces you to read

options.label: Controller Drift Trap Weight
options.description: Likelihood of receiving a trap which causes your control sticks to drift

options.label: Poison Trap Weight
options.description: Likelihood of receiving a trap which causes you to lose rings over time

options.label: Bee Trap Weight
options.description: Likelihood of receiving a trap which spawns a swarm of bees

options.label: Pong Trap Weight
options.description: Likelihood of receiving a trap which forces you to play a Pong minigame

options.label: Breakout Trap Weight
options.description: Likelihood of receiving a trap which forces you to play a Breakout minigame

options.label: Fishing Trap Weight
options.description: Likelihood of receiving a trap which forces you to play a Fishing minigame

options.label: Trivia Trap Weight
options.description: Likelihood of receiving a trap which forces you to play a Trivia minigame

options.label: Pokemon Trivia Trap Weight
options.description: Likelihood of receiving a trap which forces you to play a Pokemon Trivia minigame

options.label: Pokemon Count Trap Weight
options.description: Likelihood of receiving a trap which forces you to play a Pokemon Count minigame

options.label: Number Sequence Trap Weight
options.description: Likelihood of receiving a trap which forces you to play a Number Sequence minigame

options.label: Light Up Path Trap Weight
options.description: Likelihood of receiving a trap which forces you to play a Light Up Path minigame

options.label: Pinball Trap Weight
options.description: Likelihood of receiving a trap which forces you to play a Pinball minigame

options.label: Math Quiz Trap Weight
options.description: Likelihood of receiving a trap which forces you to solve a math problem

options.label: Snake Trap Weight
options.description: Likelihood of receiving a trap which forces you to play a Snake minigame

options.label: Input Sequence Trap Weight
options.description: Likelihood of receiving a trap which forces you to press a sequence of inputs

options.label: Minigame Trap Difficulty
options.description: How difficult any Minigame-style traps are Chaos causes the difficulty to be random per-minigame

options.label: Big Fishing Difficulty
options.description: How difficult Big's Fishing Minigames are Chaos causes the difficulty to be random per-minigame

options.label: Sadx Music
options.description: Whether the randomizer will include Sonic Adventure DX Music in the music pool SA2B: Only SA2B music will be played SADX: Only SADX music will be played Both: Both SA2B and SADX music will be played NOTE: This option requires the player to own a PC copy of SADX and to follow the addition steps in the setup guide.

options.label: Music Shuffle
options.description: What type of Music Shuffle is used None: No music is shuffled.

options.label: Voice Shuffle
options.description: What type of Voice Shuffle is used None: No voices are shuffled.

options.label: Narrator
options.description: Which menu narrator is used

options.description: The number of active missions to include for Sonic stages

options.label: Ring Link
options.description: Whether your in-level ring gain/loss is linked to other players

options.label: Trap Link
options.description: Whether your received traps are linked to other players You will also receive any linked traps from other players with Trap Link enabled, if you have a weight above "none" set for that trap

options.label: Death Link
options.description: When you die, everyone who enabled death link dies.
